title: Governance-gate negative test: build blocks a high-risk unit lacking expert sign-off or the mandatory disclaimer (deliberate fixture)
context: The content-governance gate's high-risk expert gate is only trustworthy if it is proven to block non-compliant units — not just allow compliant ones. This task adds deliberate negative-test fixtures that confirm the build fails when a high-risk (riskClass=high) unit is missing its expertSignOff record, and when a high-risk unit is missing the mandatory disclaimer. A third fixture of a fully-compliant high-risk unit must pass the gate. This is a hard safety guarantee: without this negative test, the gate could be silently broken.
objective: Add deliberate fixture content units to the test suite: one missing expertSignOff, one missing the mandatory disclaimer, and one fully compliant; confirm the content-governance gate fails the build on the first two and passes on the third.
acceptanceCriteria: A test fixture of a high-risk unit without an expertSignOff record causes the content-governance gate to fail the build with a clear error identifying the missing sign-off

A test fixture of a high-risk unit without the mandatory 'informational, not a substitute for professional electrical training, inspection, or repair' disclaimer causes the content-governance gate to fail the build with a clear error
A test fixture of a fully-compliant high-risk unit (with valid expertSignOff and the mandatory disclaimer) passes the content-governance gate
The three fixtures are committed to the test suite (not to the live content store) and run as part of the standard CI test pass
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass on the green path with the fully-compliant fixture only
output: A merged PR adding three content-governance negative/positive test fixtures confirming that the high-risk expert gate fails on missing sign-off, fails on missing disclaimer, and passes on a compliant unit.
